subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1911-10-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In the realm of materiality, though love existeth, yet it is limited; in the physical world are there means and bonds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در عالم مادیات هر چند محبت موجود ولی محدود است در عالم جسمانی وسائط و روابط
subcodes.subjects: @power of the mind over nature, @The Holy Spirit, @love and unity, @unity in diversity, @transcending the material condition, @disregarding individual capacity; weakness
